results.title: The 6 Best Aura Alternatives To Consider Right Now
results.content:
F-Secure

Protection against hackers and identity fraud.

Starts at $4/month per device.

Aura provides award-winning online protection for you and your family — but its all-in-one approach might not be the right fit for all customers.

Here are some of the best Aura alternatives you should consider right now:

### 1. Identity Guard

Why we picked it: Identity Guard is owned by the same company as Aura, and offers a similar suite of identity theft protection services. Unlike Aura, however, it offers a basic but budget-friendly “Value” plan, with identity monitoring and single-bureau credit monitoring services. [...] Unlike most alternatives that offer plans with different tiers of protection, Aura provides simple, transparent plans, with options for individuals, couples, and families (five adults and unlimited children).

> Every Aura plan comes with the same high level of protection, 24/7 access to support with trained fraud remediation professionals, and up to $5 million in identity theft insurance.

Aura’s family plans offer additional protection — including parental controls, child identity monitoring, Safe Gaming tools to warn parents of cyberbullying, and an AI-powered spam call and text blocker.

Aura pros

Aura cons

Award-winning identity theft protection that monitors over 130 unique pieces of your personal information.

Currently only available in the United States. [...] Aura is an all-in-one identity theft protection solution that combines award-winning identity theft protection with three-bureau credit report monitoring, financial account monitoring for your credit card, investment, and bank accounts (powered by artificial intelligence), digital security tools for all of your devices, online privacy features to remove your information from data broker lists, and round-the-clock fraud resolution services.

Aura stands out by providing the most extensive dark web monitoring and fastest fraud alerts3, when compared to other leading identity theft protection providers.

| Best for:  If brand trust and comprehensive restoration support matter to you, LifeLock is the strongest Aura alternative. It costs more, but you’re paying for proven expertise and the biggest reimbursement package in the industry. |

|  |  |

| Pros | Cons |
| ✅ Up to $3 million in reimbursement coverage ✅ Dedicated restoration specialists based in the US ✅ The widest range of monitoring alerts, all in one place ✅ 100% restoration guarantee or your money back ✅ 30-day free trial | ⛔ Premium tiers cost more than Aura’s basic plan ⛔ Subscription costs rise significantly after the first year ⛔ Free trial requires a credit card ⛔ Entry-level plan has fewer features ⛔ Number of plans may be confusing ⛔ Bundle with Norton 360 costs extra | [...] |  |

| Best overall alternative: LifeLock  If you want stronger brand trust and restoration guarantees, LifeLock is the better choice—offering up to $3 million in reimbursement coverage and US-based restoration specialists. |
| Best for deep credit monitoring: IdentityForce  If you want detailed credit data and three-bureau monitoring, IdentityForce offers a credit score simulator and in-depth tracking that goes beyond Aura’s simpler approach. |
| Best for cybersecurity bundles: Surfshark One+  If Aura’s VPN feels too basic, Surfshark One offers a premium VPN, personal data removal, and antivirus—without the extra features you might not use. |

results.title: Best Aura Alternatives and Competitors This May 2026
results.content:
## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the best Aura alternative?

LifeLock is the most well-known alternative with up to $3M insurance and Norton antivirus bundle. However, Aura found more dark web exposures, sent alerts faster, and includes three-bureau monitoring on all plans — while LifeLock locks this behind its highest tier.

### Is LifeLock better than Aura?

No, based on head-to-head testing. Aura found more dark web exposures, sent fraud alerts faster, and includes three-bureau credit monitoring on every plan. LifeLock is better only if you specifically want the Norton antivirus and VPN bundle.

### Is Identity Guard the same as Aura? [...] Get 68% OFF or More on Aura

Security Hero independently tests and reviews every product. We may earn a commission when you buy through our links. Read more here.

## Top 5 Aura Competitors and Alternatives To Consider This 2026

1. LifeLock
2. IDShield
3. Identity Guard
4. IdentityForce
5. Costco Complete ID

Aura is the best service available for most people, but that doesn’t mean other reputable identity protection services aren’t out there. Below, I’ll cover five of the most well-known. That way, you can find the right service for you – one that best protects your name, credit score, and all the other vital components of your identity (and maybe your family’s too).

### 1. LifeLock

LifeLock is the biggest name in identity protection, so let’s start here.
